template: custom (robust position control — 3 methods + permutation null)
prediction_outcome: confirmed: Qwen-stronger predictions 5/5 ✓✓. Phi-generalizes 0/3 ✗. Rank control at L9-L18 retains 43-59% (r=0.155-0.159, 8/8 heads, all p<0.001). Deep-layer quadratic-rank dissociation (88% vs 15-17%).
key_finding: Gold-standard rank-based control: Qwen genuine info-directed attention r≈0.16 at mid-plateau (3x Phi's r≈0.05). Deep layers dominated by non-quadratic monotonic recency. Phi's ~80% reduction was PHI-SPECIFIC. Architecture-dependent: digital >> analog.
evidence_impact: UPGRADES info-directed attention from 'downgraded after exp_097' to 'architecture-dependent but genuine'. Definitive effect sizes: Qwen r≈0.16, Phi r≈0.05. Establishes rank-based control as gold standard for future analyses.
next_planned: Apply rank control to Phi, or token-type control, or per-head V|nums probes

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: FINAL: K>V perturbation universal. K>V probing ENCODING-DEPENDENT. NOT driven by GQA.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL + ATTENTION: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive). H0 unique retrieval pattern (Exp 095).

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Probing (2 families + 2 sizes). Attention (Exp 095). REVISED probe-attn: rank-controlled r≈0.16 Qwen, r≈0.05 Phi (architecture-dependent). Paraphrase NULL. WRRA on 2 families.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPREHENSIVE: Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2 probing (2 families + 2 sizes). Probe-attn on 2 models. K/V sweeps (3 models). Info-directed attention: 3x stronger on digital (Qwen) than analog (Phi).

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + ATTENTION: digital→K>V probing→stronger info-directed attention; analog→V≥K probing→weaker info-directed attention.

attention_mechanism.status: DEFINITIVE (Exp 098): Rank-controlled info-directed attention r≈0.16 (Qwen) and r≈0.05 (Phi). Mid-plateau genuine, deep layers dominated by non-quadratic recency. Architecture-dependent: digital > analog.
